title: Bulk Guest Registration and Board allocation

posts.author: jake.wilson (Jake Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

We are using Monday.com to manage our logistics network for exchange of faulty equipment. We have many guests that I am about to manually assign access to 12x boards.

Is there an easier way to do the invitations than granting access to all the boards? I have had a look and couldn’t find anything but I might be looking in the wrong spot.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jake.wilson, good question! At the moment guests have to be added to each of the shareable boards individually from the ‘guests & subscribers’ button in the upper righthand corner of the board.

If you’d like assistance optimizing your workflow from there feel free to write in to us at support@monday.com
